---
title: "Simulation study (bootstrap inference)"
author: "Maciej Beręsewicz"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)

results_all <- readRDS("../results/sim-results-boot.rds")
setDT(results_all)

true_values <- data.table(
  target = c("y11", "y12", "y21", "y22"),
  true_mean = c(2.992724, 2.57075, 0.89095, 0.7515)
)

## boot = 0: point estimates (with analytic SE from nonprob)
## boot > 0: bootstrap replicates
results_point <- results_all[boot == 0]
results_boot  <- results_all[boot > 0]

## compute bootstrap SE and percentile 95% CI for each (k, estimator, dataset, basis, target)
boot_summary <- results_boot[, .(
  SE_boot = sd(mean, na.rm = TRUE),
  ci_lo   = quantile(mean, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
  ci_hi   = quantile(mean, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE)
), by = .(k, estimator, dataset, basis, target)]

## merge bootstrap SE and CI into point estimates
results <- merge(results_point, boot_summary,
                 by = c("k", "estimator", "dataset", "basis", "target"),
                 all.x = TRUE)

results <- merge(results, true_values, by = "target")
results[, bias := mean - true_mean]
results[, covered_analytic := as.numeric(lower_bound <= true_mean & true_mean <= upper_bound)]
results[, covered_boot := as.numeric(ci_lo <= true_mean & true_mean <= ci_hi)]

results[, basis := factor(basis,
                          c("main", "quartiles", "deciles", "main+quartiles", "main+deciles"),
                          c("totals", "quartiles", "deciles", "totals\n+quartiles", "totals\n+deciles"))]
results[, estimator := factor(estimator, c("ipw", "mi", "dr"))]
results <- results[!is.nan(SE)]

## summary statistics
summary_dt <- results[, .(
  mean_bias         = mean(bias),
  rmse_analytic     = sqrt(mean(bias^2 + SE^2)),
  rmse_boot         = sqrt(mean(bias^2 + SE_boot^2, na.rm = TRUE)),
  coverage_analytic = mean(covered_analytic),
  coverage_boot     = mean(covered_boot, na.rm = TRUE)
), by = .(target, estimator, dataset, basis)]

results_cont <- results[target %in% c("y11", "y12")]
results_bin  <- results[target %in% c("y21", "y22")]
summary_cont <- summary_dt[target %in% c("y11", "y12")]
summary_bin  <- summary_dt[target %in% c("y21", "y22")]

## shared theme and palette
theme_sim <- theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        text = element_text(size = 15))
palette_sim <- scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2")

## figures directory
dir.create("../results/figures", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
```

## Bias

### Continuous outcomes (y11, y12)

```{r bias-cont, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
results_cont |>
  subset(dataset == "bd2") |>
  transform(dataset = "BD2 (non-linear selection)",
            target = factor(target,
                            c("y11", "y12"),
                            c("y11 (linear)", "y12 (non-linear)"))) |>
  ggplot(data = _, aes(x = basis, y = bias, fill = estimator)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_grid(dataset ~ target, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_sim +
  palette_sim +
  labs(x = "Basis", y = "Bias", fill = "Estimator") -> p

p
ggsave("../results/figures/boot-bias-cont.png", p, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

### Binary outcomes (y21, y22)

```{r bias-bin, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
results_bin |>
  subset(dataset == "bd2") |>
  transform(dataset = "BD2 (non-linear selection)",
            target = factor(target,
                            c("y21", "y22"),
                            c("y21 (linear)", "y22 (non-linear)"))) |>
  ggplot(data=_, aes(x = basis, y = bias, fill = estimator)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_grid(dataset ~ target, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_sim +
  palette_sim +
  labs(x = "Basis", y = "Bias", fill = "Estimator") -> p

p
ggsave("../results/figures/boot-bias-bin.png", p, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

## SE comparison: analytic vs bootstrap

### Continuous outcomes (y11, y12)

```{r se-comp-cont, fig.width=12, fig.height=6}
se_long_cont <- melt(
  results_cont[dataset == "bd2", .(target, estimator, basis, k, SE, SE_boot)],
  id.vars = c("target", "estimator", "basis", "k"),
  measure.vars = c("SE", "SE_boot"),
  variable.name = "SE_type",
  value.name = "se_value"
)
se_long_cont[, SE_type := factor(SE_type, c("SE", "SE_boot"), c("Analytic", "Bootstrap"))]
se_long_cont[, target := factor(target,
  c("y11", "y12"), c("y11 (linear)", "y12 (non-linear)"))]

p <- ggplot(se_long_cont, aes(x = basis, y = se_value, fill = SE_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.5) +
  facet_grid(estimator ~ target, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_sim +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  labs(x = "Basis", y = "Standard error", fill = "SE method")

p
ggsave("../results/figures/boot-se-comp-cont.png", p, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

### Binary outcomes (y21, y22)

```{r se-comp-bin, fig.width=12, fig.height=6}
se_long_bin <- melt(
  results_bin[dataset == "bd2", .(target, estimator, basis, k, SE, SE_boot)],
  id.vars = c("target", "estimator", "basis", "k"),
  measure.vars = c("SE", "SE_boot"),
  variable.name = "SE_type",
  value.name = "se_value"
)
se_long_bin[, SE_type := factor(SE_type, c("SE", "SE_boot"), c("Analytic", "Bootstrap"))]
se_long_bin[, target := factor(target,
  c("y21", "y22"), c("y21 (linear)", "y22 (non-linear)"))]

p <- ggplot(se_long_bin, aes(x = basis, y = se_value, fill = SE_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.5) +
  facet_grid(estimator ~ target, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_sim +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  labs(x = "Basis", y = "Standard error", fill = "SE method")

p
ggsave("../results/figures/boot-se-comp-bin.png", p, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

## Coverage comparison: analytic CI vs bootstrap percentile CI

### Continuous outcomes (y11, y12)

```{r coverage-cont, fig.width=12, fig.height=6}
cov_long_cont <- melt(
  summary_cont[dataset == "bd2"],
  id.vars = c("target", "estimator", "basis"),
  measure.vars = c("coverage_analytic", "coverage_boot"),
  variable.name = "CI_type",
  value.name = "coverage"
)
cov_long_cont[, CI_type := factor(CI_type,
  c("coverage_analytic", "coverage_boot"), c("Analytic", "Bootstrap percentile"))]
cov_long_cont[, target := factor(target,
  c("y11", "y12"), c("y11 (linear)", "y12 (non-linear)"))]

p <- ggplot(cov_long_cont, aes(x = basis, y = coverage, fill = CI_type)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge()) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.95, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_grid(estimator ~ target) +
  theme_sim +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  labs(x = "Basis", y = "Coverage", fill = "CI method")

p
ggsave("../results/figures/boot-coverage-cont.png", p, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

### Binary outcomes (y21, y22)

```{r coverage-bin, fig.width=12, fig.height=6}
cov_long_bin <- melt(
  summary_bin[dataset == "bd2"],
  id.vars = c("target", "estimator", "basis"),
  measure.vars = c("coverage_analytic", "coverage_boot"),
  variable.name = "CI_type",
  value.name = "coverage"
)
cov_long_bin[, CI_type := factor(CI_type,
  c("coverage_analytic", "coverage_boot"), c("Analytic", "Bootstrap percentile"))]
cov_long_bin[, target := factor(target,
  c("y21", "y22"), c("y21 (linear)", "y22 (non-linear)"))]

p <- ggplot(cov_long_bin, aes(x = basis, y = coverage, fill = CI_type)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge()) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.95, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_grid(estimator ~ target) +
  theme_sim +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  labs(x = "Basis", y = "Coverage", fill = "CI method")

p
ggsave("../results/figures/boot-coverage-bin.png", p, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

## RMSE comparison: analytic SE vs bootstrap SE

### Continuous outcomes (y11, y12)

```{r rmse-cont, fig.width=12, fig.height=6}
rmse_long_cont <- melt(
  summary_cont[dataset == "bd2"],
  id.vars = c("target", "estimator", "basis"),
  measure.vars = c("rmse_analytic", "rmse_boot"),
  variable.name = "SE_type",
  value.name = "rmse_value"
)
rmse_long_cont[, SE_type := factor(SE_type,
  c("rmse_analytic", "rmse_boot"), c("Analytic SE", "Bootstrap SE"))]
rmse_long_cont[, target := factor(target,
  c("y11", "y12"), c("y11 (linear)", "y12 (non-linear)"))]

p <- ggplot(rmse_long_cont, aes(x = basis, y = rmse_value, fill = SE_type)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge()) +
  facet_grid(estimator ~ target, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_sim +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  labs(x = "Basis", y = "RMSE", fill = "SE used in RMSE")

p
ggsave("../results/figures/boot-rmse-cont.png", p, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

### Binary outcomes (y21, y22)

```{r rmse-bin, fig.width=12, fig.height=6}
rmse_long_bin <- melt(
  summary_bin[dataset == "bd2"],
  id.vars = c("target", "estimator", "basis"),
  measure.vars = c("rmse_analytic", "rmse_boot"),
  variable.name = "SE_type",
  value.name = "rmse_value"
)
rmse_long_bin[, SE_type := factor(SE_type,
  c("rmse_analytic", "rmse_boot"), c("Analytic SE", "Bootstrap SE"))]
rmse_long_bin[, target := factor(target,
  c("y21", "y22"), c("y21 (linear)", "y22 (non-linear)"))]

p <- ggplot(rmse_long_bin, aes(x = basis, y = rmse_value, fill = SE_type)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge()) +
  facet_grid(estimator ~ target, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_sim +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  labs(x = "Basis", y = "RMSE", fill = "SE used in RMSE")

p
ggsave("../results/figures/boot-rmse-bin.png", p, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```
